cards.myProfileSubtitle: View school record and profile photo

myProfile.heroHint: Tap the photo to change it here. Your school can also set your photo from the admin panel. Other details are read-only and come from your school records.
myProfile.notice: No student or teacher record is linked to this login. If you are a student or teacher, contact your school administrator.

alerts.permissionMessage: Allow photo library access to change your profile picture.
alerts.readPhotoMessage: The image could not be copied for upload. Try again, or pick the photo without using the crop screen.
alerts.uploadFailedFallback: Could not update your photo. Please try again.

fields.profilePhotoHint: You or your school can set this (tap photo above)
fields.name: Name

helpSupport.lead: Need help with the application? Send us an email and we will get back to you.
helpSupport.footerNote: More support options will be available here in a future update.

documents.title: Documents
documents.errorMessage: Unable to load documents. You can add documents below to complete the profile, or tap Retry to try again.
documents.emptyState: No documents uploaded yet. Tap + to add the first one.
documents.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{filename}}"?
documents.unavailableMessage: This document cannot be opened. Try uploading again.

uploadModal.title: Upload document
uploadModal.prepareFailed: Something went wrong preparing the file.
uploadModal.uploadFailedHint: Upload failed. Use PDF or images under about 5 MB (large images are compressed automatically).

viewer.expoGoHint: Open the PDF in another app (Expo Go does not include the in-app PDF viewer).
viewer.sharingUnavailable: Sharing is not available on this device.
